text: Why does time crawl when you're a kid, but fly by when you're grown? Is it just that each year is a smaller slice of your life? Nope, the real reason is weirder, and it lets you slow time back down.

segments.text: Why does time crawl when you're a kid,
but fly by when you're grown?
Is it just that each year is a smaller slice of your life?
Nope, the real reason is weirder,
and it lets you slow time back down.
